## Summary

-

## Safety

- [ ] No API keys, OAuth secrets, owner tokens, database URLs, `.env`, or private exports are included.
- [ ] Connector writes/autopublishing remain guarded by auth and approval.
- [ ] User-facing docs were updated when behavior changed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:api`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
